color.$description: Semantic roles repointed onto the Doctor School brand (brand → token map §1.3). Light-first; the .dark overrides live in semantic.dark.json. Brand primary = blue.500 #2D84F2 stays the brand ANCHOR (link text, focus ring, icons, tints). White-on-fill AA (ADR-0013 §7): white on blue.500 is only 3.69:1, so a NORMAL-weight filled action does NOT paint blue.500 — it uses the accessible action-fill triad `primary-action` (blue.700, white 8.14:1, resting), `primary-hover` (blue.800, 11.12:1), `primary-pressed` (blue.800), which keeps a visible resting→hover interaction delta (#270 L1/L3) while clearing AA on every state. The same blue.700 AA rule governs any text-bearing brand FILL, not just actions: `primary-surface` (blue.700) is the brand fill for a coloured panel/surface that carries normal-weight white copy (e.g. the auth brand panel) — `primary` (blue.500) would only clear AA for large/bold text on it. Status = brand green/orange + introduced red.

background.$description: The default page/app surface. Pair with `foreground` for text.

foreground.$description: Default text and icon colour, used on `background`.

card.$description: A raised surface (card, popover, panel) sitting on `background`. Pair with `card-foreground`.

card-foreground.$description: Text and icon colour on a `card` surface.

primary.$description: Brand anchor (blue.500) for link text, focus accents, icons and tints. NOT a normal-weight filled action — that fails AA; use `primary-action`.

primary-foreground.$description: Text and icon colour ON a primary/action fill (white on the brand button).

primary-action.$description: Resting fill for a normal-weight filled primary button (blue.700, AA on white). Pairs with `primary-foreground`.

primary-hover.$description: Hover fill for a primary action (darker than the resting `primary-action`).

primary-pressed.$description: Pressed/active fill for a primary action.

primary-surface.$description: Brand-coloured panel/surface that carries normal-weight white copy (e.g. the auth brand panel).

secondary.$description: Low-emphasis tonal fill (secondary buttons, subtle chips). Pair with `secondary-foreground`.

secondary-foreground.$description: Text and icon colour on a `secondary` fill.

muted.$description: A muted background for subtle fills, hovered rows or disabled tracks.

muted-foreground.$description: De-emphasised text — helper text, placeholders, captions, metadata.

accent.$description: Hover/selected background for interactive list items and ghost buttons. Pair with `accent-foreground`.

accent-foreground.$description: Text and icon colour on an `accent` surface.

success.$description: Positive-status fill, border or icon. Pair with `success-foreground`.

success-foreground.$description: Text and icon colour on a `success` fill.

warning.$description: Caution-status fill, border or icon. Pair with `warning-foreground`.

warning-foreground.$description: Text and icon colour on a `warning` fill.

destructive.$description: Error/danger fill, border or icon — destructive actions and invalid state. Pair with `destructive-foreground`.

destructive-foreground.$description: Text and icon colour on a `destructive` fill.

border.$description: Default border and divider colour on surfaces.

input.$description: Border colour of form inputs and controls.

ring.$description: The keyboard-focus ring colour (the `focus-visible` ring on every interactive primitive).
